data.title: Whales repurchased FARTCOIN, spending $2.53 million to buy 2.37 million FARTCOIN
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to @OnchainLens monitoring, a whale recently re-purchased FARTCOIN, using 2.53 million USDC to purchase approximately 2.37 million FARTCOIN at an average price of US$1.06.

data.title: GitHub Repository t3rn-swap Found with Backdoor Code
data.description: According to PANews, a GitHub repository named t3rn-swap has been discovered to contain backdoor code, as disclosed by X user @Xuegaogx. The code silently sends users' private keys to a specified ID via Telegram, with the critical backdoor located in the record_config function. The project's author, @hao3313076, responded by stating that he was also a victim of theft, although his comments were criticized for being overly candid. The community is urging users to immediately cease using the script and replace any affected private keys.

data.title: BitMart market report: BTC fluctuates upward and is only one step away from returning to $100,000
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to BitMart's market report on May 8, the total market value of the cryptocurrency market is 3.28 trillion US dollars, up 2.58% from the previous day; BTC fluctuated upward, and it was only one step away from returning to 100,000 US dollars. BTCD temporarily reported 64.4%, hitting a new high in nearly four years; ETH followed the rise and fall of the market, and the ETH/BTC exchange rate fell below 0.019 again. ETH lacked the opportunity to break out of the independent market; altcoins generally rose, but there were not many tokens that were significantly stronger than the market performance, and the fully circulated meme coins performed well; the fear and greed index was 53, which was in the "neutral" range. The comprehensive long-short ratio was 1.23. The market sentiment was neutral in the short term, and the wait-and-see sentiment was strong. Investors need to pay close attention to the subsequent capital flow and sentiment changes.

data.title: US banks can handle customer crypto assets held in custody, regulator confirms
data.description:
The US Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC) has confirmed banks under its jurisdiction can trade crypto on behalf of customers and outsource some crypto activities to third parties.  Acting comptroller Rodney Hood said in a May 7 letter that banks and federal savings associations can buy and sell crypto they hold in custody at customers’ direction. The OCC added in a press release that financial institutions can also outsource bank-permissible crypto activities, including custody and execution services, to third parties in compliance with applicable law. “Additionally, these banks may provide other custody services, including record keeping, tax or reporting services for their customers,” Hood said in a May 7 video posted to X
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/occ-allows-banks-handle-customer-crypto-assets-held-in-custody?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Bitget Onchain Trading (Onchain) launches mog/acc, GIGGLES, and pitcoin tokens
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget Chain Trading (Onchain) has launched Solana ecosystem's MEME tokens mog/acc, GIGGLES, and pitcoin. Users can start trading in the on-chain trading section.

Bitget Chain Trading (Onchain) aims to seamlessly connect CEX and DEX to provide users with a more convenient, efficient, and secure on-chain trading experience. Users can directly use Bitget spot accounts (USDT/USDC) to trade popular assets on the chain. Currently, popular public chains such as Solana (SOL), BNB Smart Chain (BSC), and Base are supported.

data.title: The previously stolen lending agreement Loopscale will resume withdrawals tomorrow night
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: The Solana ecological lending protocol Loopscale, which was previously hacked, officially announced that it plans to resume withdrawals at 10:00 EST on May 9 (22:00 Beijing time on May 9). Although the protocol update patch has been audited, the initial 24-hour withdrawal amount for each user will still be limited: SOL deposit users can withdraw up to 2,500 SOL every 24 hours, USDC and USDG users can withdraw up to 500,000 USDC/USDG every 24 hours, and jitoSOL users can withdraw up to 500 jitoSOL every 24 hours.
According to previous news, Loopscale was hacked last month due to a security vulnerability, and about 5.7 million USDC and 1,200 SOL were stolen. After negotiation with the hacker, all the lost funds have been recovered.

data.title: The eighth address in the Trump dinner is suspected of clearing its position, and transferred out more than 400,000 Trumps four days ago
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to on-chain data monitoring, the address currently ranked eighth in the TRUMP dinner ranking transferred a total of more than 408,000 TRUMPs to Meteora through two transactions four days ago, which was worth about 4.68 million US dollars at the price at that time. Currently, the address has only 0.079 TRUMPs left, and it is suspected that the liquidation operation has been completed. However, since the TRUMP dinner ranking is weighted by time, the address is still retained in the eighth place.

data.title: Potential Security Risk Identified in t3rn Script
data.description: According to Odaily, a cryptocurrency key opinion leader, @Xuegaogx, has revealed a potential security risk in a script shared by X user @hao3313076. The script, associated with t3rn, allegedly contains a backdoor that could silently transmit users' private keys to a Telegram account with the ID 5963704377. This function disguises its true operation by masquerading as a configuration log output, while actually including the plaintext private keys.

data.title: Arizona Governor Officially Enacts Bill to Create State-Managed Fund to Hold Unclaimed Crypto
data.description:
Arizona Governor Hobbs signed House Bill 2749 into law, which allows the state to establish a reserve fund to hold unclaimed crypto, airdrops.

data.description: According to Foresight News, as reported by Cointelegraph, USD1 has ascended to become the seventh largest stablecoin in the world. Its market capitalization has reached $2.2 billion.

data.title: Whale Address Closes BTC Short Position After Price Surge
data.description: According to Odaily, a whale address has closed its Bitcoin short position following a significant price increase in BTC. The decision resulted in an overall loss exceeding $1.6 million.

data.title: Crypto KOL: A user-written t3rn script is suspected to contain a backdoor, and the private key may be silently sent to Telegram
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Crypto KOL @Xuegaogx disclosed that the t3rn script released by X user @hao3313076 is suspected to have a backdoor risk. Combined with the private key input call logic, the user's private key can be silently sent to the account with ID 5963704377 through the Telegram API. The function disguises the real behavior by disguising the log output as a configuration record, and the actual content contains the plaintext private key.
